IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (33241454.pdf)
SUMMARY: Seeking a position as an Information Technology Specialist. Over 5 years of information technology experience in the U.S. Army, including over 1 year of supervisory experience.
SKILLS: Army, Cisco, counseling, customer assistance, database, documentation, Information Technology, inventory, IP, LAN, Windows 7, Network, personnel, policies, protocols, repairs, Routing, San, supervisor, test equipment, troubleshoot, WAN

SOURCE: 33241454.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Supervisor
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 01/2011 to 05/2014
DESCRIPTION: ['Supervised up to 10 personnel at one time.', 'Trained and evaluated IT equipment setup.', 'Managed inventory of over $1 million worth of network communications equipment.', 'Maintained signal communications for Fort Bragg army base.']

COMPANY: Company Name

DESCRIPTION: ['Maintained communications equipment.', 'Troubleshot and repaired malfunctioning equipment.', 'Set up and added computer systems to a communication network.']
